bugs.error_message: Wrong reference: master should be main

bundle exec jekyll build hung / failed on this machine: (1) gem install & bundle install stuck fetching from https://rubygems.org (unreachable in CN); (2) after mirror, `cannot load such file -- csv` (LoadError) under bundle exec; (3) `undefined method 'tainted?' for true` from liquid-4.0.3
bugs.root_cause: rubygems.org unreachable from China (gem sources mirror does NOT apply to bundler); Ruby 3.4 unbundled csv/base64/bigdecimal/logger/ostruct/singleton/benchmark from stdlib so Jekyll 4.2.2 require'ing them fails under bundle exec; Ruby 3.2+ removed Object#tainted? which Liquid 4.0.3 (pinned by jekyll 4.2.x) still calls
bugs.fix: (a) gem sources -> https://gems.ruby-china.com AND `bundle config set mirror.https://rubygems.org https://gems.ruby-china.com` (stored in .bundle/config, Gemfile stays clean); (b) added csv/base64/bigdecimal/logger/ostruct/singleton/benchmark to Gemfile; (c) added _plugins/ruby3_compat.rb shim restoring tainted?/taint/untaint as no-ops. Also: never run two bundle install concurrently (bundler lock deadlock).
